---
title: "La Bouillie de la comtesse Berthe"
---

## La Bouillie de la comtesse Berthe

**Author:** Alexandre Dumas
**Date:** 1845
**Imprint:** Paris : Hetzel

### Notes

This work appeared in several English translations; CMY refers to the 1846 Chapman & Hall edition with 100 illustrations done by Albert Bertall for the French edition.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
